description: Comparative LLM benchmark — same prompts sent to Anthropic (/v1/messages) and OpenAI-compatible (/v1/chat/completions) format endpoints. Weight=0.00 in observation mode; scored but does not affect composite.

tasks.name: Basic completion (Anthropic format)

messages.content: Arena comparison test — reply with exactly one word.

tasks.notes: Baseline Anthropic format — simple prompt for cross-format latency comparison.

tasks.name: Basic completion (OpenAI/Mistral format)

messages.content: Arena comparison test — reply with exactly one word.

tasks.notes: Same prompt as cmp-01 but in OpenAI-compatible format. Measures format translation overhead.

tasks.name: System message (Anthropic format)

body.system: You are a classification engine. Respond with exactly: POSITIVE or NEGATIVE.

tasks.notes: Classification task (Anthropic). Good candidate for Mistral co-processing.

tasks.name: System message (OpenAI/Mistral format)

messages.content: You are a classification engine. Respond with exactly: POSITIVE or NEGATIVE.

tasks.notes: Same classification task in OpenAI format. System message as first message in array.

tasks.name: Concurrent mixed-format requests
tasks.notes: Concurrent requests — verifies proxy handles mixed-format traffic under load.

tasks.name: Concurrent mixed-format requests (OpenAI)
tasks.notes: Paired with cmp-05 — same concurrency test on OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
